title: Our Favourite Heritage Walk Moments
excerpt: There's a special magic in walking through the streets of Bombay with a purpose — to look up, to notice the details, and to listen to the stories the buildings have to tell.
body_html:
There's a special magic in walking through the streets of Bombay with a purpose — to look up, to notice the details, and to listen to the stories the buildings have to tell. Our heritage walks are more than just tours; they are curated journeys through time.

The city's architectural expression lies in the layers of historic events and cross-cultural influences, manifesting in a language that has become our very own and a part of our growth.

Discovering Hidden Details

One of the greatest joys is pointing out a detail that often goes unnoticed: a whimsical gargoyle perched on a university facade, the intricate monkey carvings on the old Secretariat building, or the stunning stained-glass windows hidden within a library. These are the moments when a familiar building suddenly becomes new again.

At Bombay Gothic, we believe the city reveals its secrets to those who walk its streets with open eyes and a curious heart. Every heritage walk is an opportunity to discover the stories behind the stone — and to bring those stories home through our curated collection of heritage-inspired art and curios.

Join us on our next heritage walk — follow @bombaygothic on Instagram for upcoming dates and routes.
